title: [DEPRECATED] The Bombardier Turbostar Pack
description:
REPLACED BY:  https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-turbostar-class-168170171172-pack-mtr4

Class 170s, and Class 171 Turbostars in East Midlands Railway, South West Trains, Southern, and CrossCountry liveries for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
![XC Turbostar pauses at a train station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8714e59b2f458ff84fabdc1cc3810cb323c72de_0.webp)






# Superseded and replaced by [this pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-turbostar-class-168170171172-pack-mtr4)







~~**Now updated to MTR4!**
Serving the regional lines of the UK, from Salisbury to Scotland, now available in pixel form with custom sounds!~~

~~Including custom interiors, and **6** liveries:~~

~~_East Midlands Railway (Aubergine)_ - The usual purple EMR livery~~

~~_East Midlands Railway (Southern Interim)_ - Southern livery & interior with EMR branding~~

~~_CrossCountry Trains_ - Arriva CrossCountry livery~~

~~_CrossCountry Trains Pride_ - Identical to standard XC livery, but with the altered branding~~

~~_South West Trains (White)_ - A blast from the past, as carried until their transfer away after being replaced by additional Express Sprinter units.~~

~~_Southern_ - The livery carried by the Southern Railway turbostar fleet, identical to the 377 EMUs~~

**_Special thanks to Navi (LX9702) for making a Turbostar soundset, and I hope you enjoy the pack!_**
